secondary_operation: commit a CODEOWNERS file to main
reason: Cross-cutting SPOF (NoBranchProtection / SingleAdminCollaborator / CrossCuttingSingleAdmin in ../load-path.ttl): single admin account, no branch protection, no CODEOWNERS -- can merge to main or push tags/releases with no second reviewer.
plan_hash_source: Constructed from packs/gh-terraform-pack/ontology.ttl's ghtf:MainBranchProtection HCL body (already-generated desired state, PR #341/#348/#334), translated to the equivalent GitHub REST API PUT body. Local computation only -- not sent.
post_checks: gh api repos/seanchatmangpt/ggen/branches/main/protection returns non-404 with the expected required-checks list
a test PR from a non-admin account is blocked from merging without review
invalidation_condition: Regenerate plan_hash if ghtf:MainBranchProtection's HCL body changes, or if target_state_reconfirmed_facts no longer match a fresh gh api check.
required_authorization: explicit user ! command executing the operation above -- this packet does not authorize itself
